data.title: International Forum Highlights Humanoid Robots' Industrial Potential
data.description:
The second International Humanoid Robot Forum took place from February 19 to 20 at the Biel/Bienne Innovation Park in Switzerland. According to Jin10, the event gathered representatives from research institutions, businesses, and investors worldwide to discuss the industrialization and development of embodied intelligence in humanoid robots. 

Dominique Gorecki, the forum's chairman and head of the Swiss Collaborative Robotics Competence Center, emphasized in his opening remarks that humanoid robots are transitioning from laboratory research to industrial applications. He highlighted that cross-industry collaboration will be crucial in advancing the implementation of these technologies.

data.title: OKX launches "Welcoming the God of Wealth" livestream event, showering viewers with OKB red envelopes in 6 sessions.
data.description: According to official news, OKX's "Welcoming the God of Wealth" Chinese New Year special live stream has begun. During the live stream, the "Collect Five Blessings" activity will be held, and the grand prize of 1 BTC hash will be announced. In addition, a red packet rain will be distributed during the live stream from 14:00 to 21:00 (UTC+8) on February 21, 2026. There will be 6 red packet rain sessions, each starting on the hour and lasting 45 seconds. Users can enter the activity page through the red packet rain pop-up window after entering the OKX App, and can click the screen when the red packets fall to receive OKB red packets. There is a limit to the number of participants in each red packet rain session, and it's first-come, first-served. Participation requires the OKX App to be updated to version 6.100.0 or above.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a net inflow of $3.7774 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 20th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $3.7774 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $3.0485 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $694 million. The second largest was the Franklin Solana ETF (SOEZ), with a net inflow of $728,900, bringing its total historical net inflow to $6.7432 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs is $737 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.53%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $889 million.

data.title: Mantle Launches ERC-8004 Standard, Enabling Autonomous AI Finance
data.description:
By providing AI agents with verifiable identity, reputation, and validation, Mantle aims to transform autonomous financial operations, bridging DeFi, TradFi, and real-world assets on a scalable, institutional-grade infrastructure.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/mantle-launches-erc-8004-standard-enabling-autonomous-ai-finance/

data.title: Hong Kong Gold Exchange announces it will develop a digital commodity blockchain.
data.description: The Hong Kong Gold Exchange held its Lunar New Year opening ceremony yesterday. In his address, HKG Exchange Chairman Cheung Tak-hei stated that the exchange has officially partnered with a member company of the Alibaba Group to develop a digital commodity blockchain, an international precious metals trading platform, and a clearing and settlement system. This will provide unified risk control and supervision for all systems in Hong Kong, including spot, futures, digital gold, B2C trading, actuarial center, and over-the-counter (OTC) trading. The system is expected to be completed within six months, and the exchange hopes to connect to the "Hong Kong Gold Central Clearing System" established by the Hong Kong SAR government. (Hong Kong Wen Wei Po)

data.title: Whale 'pension-usdt.eth' Closes BTC and ETH Positions with $1.46 Million Profit
data.description: A significant cryptocurrency whale, identified as 'pension-usdt.eth,' has closed its Bitcoin and Ethereum positions, securing a profit of $1.46 million. According to ChainCatcher, this information was monitored by Onchain Lens. The whale's strategic move in the crypto market highlights the ongoing activity and potential for substantial gains within the digital currency space.

data.title: Ethereum's Mayer Multiple Nears Key Threshold
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X that Ethereum's last two cycle bottoms occurred when the 'Mayer Multiple' fell below 0.5. Currently, the Mayer Multiple stands at 0.56, indicating a potential approach to this critical level. The Mayer Multiple is a metric used by traders to assess the value of cryptocurrencies, comparing the current price to the 200-day moving average. A drop below 0.5 has historically signaled a market bottom for Ethereum, suggesting that investors are closely monitoring this indicator for potential buying opportunities.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Surpasses $300 Billion as On-Chain Dollar Liquidity Hits Record
data.description:
The total stablecoin market capitalization has officially moved above $300 billion, marking a nearly sixfold increase from under $50 billion in early 2020. The expansion highlights a structural shift in crypto liquidity.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/stablecoin-market-cap-surpasses-300-billion-as-on-chain-dollar-liquidity-hits-record/

data.title: Hong Kong's Financial Market Sees Growth Amid New Listings and Developments
data.description:
Hong Kong has witnessed significant growth in its financial market this year, with approximately 20 companies going public, raising around HKD 80 billion. According to RTHK, about 480 companies are awaiting listing, including 10 international firms. The average daily turnover in the stock market last month exceeded HKD 270 billion, with a single-day peak surpassing HKD 300 billion.

Financial Secretary Christopher Hui stated in a radio program that Hong Kong's current stock market performance is not coincidental but a result of collective efforts by society, including the government and regulatory bodies. He emphasized the importance of confidence, determination, and perseverance, highlighting that the country's development, including advancements in productivity and technology, provides a strong foundation for Hong Kong's growth. Hui stressed the advantages of the "one country, two systems" policy and the opportunities presented by national development.

In addition to stock market development, the government is keen on promoting new asset classes, such as the bond and commodity markets, aiming to establish Hong Kong as a comprehensive international financial center that connects financial services with the real economy. Hui noted that since Hong Kong received recognition from the London Metal Exchange last year, 15 storage facilities have been established, storing over 20,000 tons of non-ferrous metals.

Furthermore, Hui mentioned that the number of family offices in Hong Kong has increased to 3,384, marking a growth of over 25% since 2003. These family offices have diverse needs, including accounting, investment management, and legal services, contributing approximately HKD 13 billion annually to the economy. Hui expressed hopes to attract both domestic and international funds to Hong Kong, benefiting the local economy, service industry, and job market.

data.title: Unibase and Kaito See Significant Unfollows on X
data.description:
In the past week, the decentralized AI memory layer Unibase has experienced the highest number of unfollows among top figures on X, according to ChainCatcher. Influential users such as BroLeon (@BroLeon) and 0xAA (@0xAA_Science) are among those who have unfollowed the project.

Additionally, Kaito is another project that has seen a significant number of unfollows from prominent figures on the platform.

data.title: Moonbirds to Unlock 27.08 Million Tokens on February 28
data.description: Moonbirds is set to unlock approximately 27.08 million tokens on February 28 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the data provided by the Web3 asset data platform, RootData. The tokens are valued at around $4.9 million.

data.title: Marina Protocol to Unlock Tokens on February 28
data.description: Marina Protocol is set to unlock approximately 26.58 million tokens on February 28 at 10:00 AM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the protocol's planned schedule.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Visit China in Late March
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to visit China from March 31 to April 2. According to PANews, White House officials have confirmed the visit, which follows previous statements expressing anticipation for a welcoming ceremony.

data.title: Polymarket's Strategic Acquisition of Dome: Expanding Prediction Market Ecosystem
data.description: Crypto KOL 岳小鱼 (@yuexiaoyu) posted on X about Polymarket's recent acquisition of Dome, highlighting the company's ambition to expand its prediction market ecosystem. Dome serves as a unified prediction market API, enabling developers to access data from multiple platforms, including Polymarket and Kalshi. This strategic move aims to streamline access to market data, odds, trading volumes, and historical information, enhancing the functionality and reach of Polymarket's services.

Why this matters: Buterin's approach favors continuity over fragmentation while injecting stronger cypherpunk principles into the base layer. What to watch: will the proposed five-year timeline—possibly shortened by “AI coding and verification”—proves realistic? What do you think?
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/293877725612465?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: South Korea Maintains Trade Agreement Despite U.S. Tariff Ruling
data.description: South Korea announced that a recent U.S. Supreme Court decision, which nullified tariffs imposed under U.S. President Donald Trump's emergency powers, will not affect its comprehensive trade agreement with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X that the South Korean government emphasized the stability of its trade relations with Washington, despite the court's ruling. The decision by the Supreme Court addressed tariffs that were initially implemented as part of emergency measures. South Korea reassured that its trade framework with the U.S. remains intact and unaffected by this legal development.

data.title: This morning, Brother Machi placed multiple limit sell orders for ETH again, bringing the total number of sell orders to 14 in the $1980-$2025 range.
data.description: According to Hyperbot data, Huang Licheng, nicknamed "Brother Machi," placed multiple limit sell orders for Ethereum again in the early hours of today. Currently, he has placed a total of 14 limit sell orders for ETH in the range of $1,980 to $2,025. His 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum still holds 7,800 ETH, with a liquidation price of approximately $1,905, and is currently showing a floating loss of approximately $137,000.

data.title: Trump Opposes New Bridge Project Between Michigan and Canada
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump recently expressed opposition to a proposed bridge connecting Michigan with Canada. New York Times posted on X that this stance emerged less than a month after a billionaire, who owns a competing bridge, made significant contributions to Trump's campaign. The proposed bridge has been a topic of debate, with various stakeholders weighing in on its potential economic and logistical impacts. Trump's position has added a new dimension to the ongoing discussions, highlighting the intersection of infrastructure development and political influence.

data.title: JPMorgan Seeks to Transfer Trump's Lawsuit to New York Federal Court
data.description: JPMorgan has filed a legal request to transfer U.S. President Donald Trump's lawsuit concerning the closure of his accounts from Miami to a federal court in New York. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the bank's strategic move to shift the case's jurisdiction. The lawsuit, initiated by Trump, challenges the bank's decision to close his accounts, a matter that has drawn significant attention. The request for relocation underscores the complexities involved in the legal proceedings surrounding the case.
